programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: É Dia das Crianças e Ash e seus amigos ajudam alguns alunos a comemorarem. A Equipe Rocket estraga a diversão pegando uma criança ao invés de Pikachu. Em uma cadeia de eventos chocante, Meowth se torna bonzinho... será mesmo?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Nossos heróis viajam para a Ilha de Cinnabar, onde Ash espera ganhar a Insígnia do Vulcão. Um estranho propõe charadas para encontrar o Ginásio onde Ash e Pikachu têm uma batalha com um Pokémon que eles nunca viram antes!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash finalmente localizou o Ginásio, suspenso sobre um poço de lava derretida! Apenas um poderoso Pokémon tipo-fogo poderia ajudá-lo nesta batalha pela Insígnia do Vulcão, então Ash precisa confiar em seu Charizard rebelde.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Enquanto Ash e sua turma correm para pegar a última balsa para fora da Ilha de Cinnabar, eles são desviados por um grupo de Squirtle, Wartortle e Blastoise que precisam de sua ajuda!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: O Horsea de Misty precisa desesperadamente se exercitar, então a turma decide levá-lo ao Ginásio das irmãs dela na Cidade de Cerulean. Lá, ela descobre que suas irmãs estão planejando um excitante balé subaquático.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash, Brock e Misty são desviados para a Cidade de Viridian quando todos os seus pertences misteriosamente desaparecem. Enquanto procuram por suas coisas, eles presenciam contatos imediatos que são fora deste mundo!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Nossos heróis seguem à Cidade de Viridian, onde Ash espera receber a Insígnia da Terra. Eles chegam ao Ginásio bem a tempo de ver seu rival, Gary, ser derrotado por um Pokémon desconhecido - E Gary insiste que ele é maligno!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: No caminho de volta para a Cidade de Pallet, nossos heróis encontram um Mr. Mime fugitivo. Ash se disfarça de outro Mr. Mime para poder se aproximar. Quando a Equipe Rocket atacar, pegarão eles o Mr. Mime correto?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Nossos heróis se encontram numa encruzilhada e decidem escalar uma íngreme e perigosa montanha. Pikachu se perde e todos precisam trabalhar juntos para encontrá-lo, se manterem aquecidos e resistirem a uma tempestade.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Na casa do Professor Carvalho, Ash e Gary conversam sobre a próxima Liga Pokémon. O Professor diz que eles deviam aprender um com o outro ao invés de competir, o que se prova verdade quando a Equipe Rocket ataca!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash tira férias com sua mãe nas Ilhas Espuma-do-Mar. Lá, ele procura o programador do Pokédex para aprender sobre a incomum evolução de SlowPoké e esse mistério acaba revelado através das trapalhadas da Equipe Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash sofre uma cãibra enquanto tentava surfar e é salvo por Victor, que conta sobre a Humungadunga, uma onda gigante que vem a cada 20 anos. Será que Ash dará a Victor a confiança que ele precisa para pegar a Grande Onda?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Na cidade de Pallet, Ash e seus amigos conhecem Florinda, que acha que seu Gloom não evolui porque ela não o treina direito. Quando a Equipe Rocket ataca, o poder de um Pokémon se revela!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Um famoso diretor aparece e todos querem ser a estrela! Como ele só aceita Pokémon em seu filme, Ash, Brock, Misty e a Equipe Rocket brigam para ver de quem será o Pokémon a contracenar com Wigglytuff.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Quando a turma participa da estreia do filme, Meowth se lembra de seu doloroso passado. Ele divide a história de sua vida antes da Equipe Rocket, incluindo como ele aprendeu a andar e falar como um humano.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Com apenas três semanas faltando para a Liga Pokémon, Ash, Brock e Misty vão ao Monte Escondido para encontrar um membro da Elite dos Quatro. Eles estão em busca de dicas de treinamento Pokémon, mas acabam encontrando uma terra de Onix supercrescidos!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Enquanto Ash e Brock treinam para a Liga Pokémon acabam descobrindo um templo com Fósseis de Pokémon. Misty se lembra de uma cidade escondida com templos em honra aos Pokémon. Será que eles acharam a cidade perdida de Pokémópolis?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Nossos heróis seguem ao torneio da Liga Pokémon no Planalto Índigo quando encontram outro Treinador. Infelizmente, suas insígnias de Ginásio foram roubadas e ele não poderá competir a não ser que roube as do Ash!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: A Liga Pokémon está para começar com o acendimento cerimonial da tocha que carrega a chama do Pokémon Lendário Moltres. Obviamente, a Equipe Rocket tenta roubá-la!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: É o primeiro dia da Liga Pokémon, e quando os amigos de Ash descobrem que sua primeira batalha será no Campo da Água, eles o enchem de conselhos!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Conforme a Liga Pokémon continua, Ash batalha no Campo de Pedra e acaba se encontrando com a Equipe Rocket depois deles montarem um Centro Pokémon falso para atrair Treinadores incautos!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash enfrenta sua adversária mais forte até então no Campo de Grama na Liga Pokémon! Estarão ele e seu Bulbasaur prontos para enfrentar esta oponente e seu poderoso Scyther?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Quando Ash conhece um Treinador chamado Richie na Liga Pokémon, os dois rapazes rapidamente se tornam grandes amigos, assim como seus dois Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Na 5ª rodada da Liga Pokémon, Ash e Richie irão se enfrentar! Será que a amizade dos dois sobreviverá a esta importante batalha?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty e Brock estão na arquibancada torcendo por Richie quando a Liga Pokémon chega ao fim. Então eles caminham juntos para a cerimônia de encerramento. Essa uma experiência que Ash lembrará durante toda sua jornada como Treinador!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ash e seus amigos voltam à Cidade de Pallet onde são recebidos como heróis, apenas para serem mandados em outra jornada! O professor Carvalho está em busca de uma misteriosa Poké Bola e pede que eles a encontrem.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Nossos heróis se preparam para sua jornada à Ilha Valência para trazer a misteriosa Poké Bola para o Professor Carvalho. Ash ganha uma viagem de dirigível grátis e relaxa... mas quem será que pilota essa coisa?

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Ao fazer um pouso de emergência na Ilha Valência, nossos heróis se dirigem ao Laboratório da Professora Ivy, onde a misteriosa Poké Bola é mantida. Brock se encanta ao ver que a professora e as suas colegas são criadoras Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja
programme.desc: Graças à música de ninar de um Jigglypuff, o dirigível que levava Ash e Misty de volta para casa sai de seu curso e cai em uma ilha onde eles encontram um novo amigo chamado Tracey enquanto tentavam ajudar um Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: As Aventuras nas Ilhas Laranja

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: In Coopers Crossing lebt die Geschichte von dem alten "Hughie", der seit vielen Jahren unerkannt im Busch leben soll. Gemeinsam mit einer Reporterin mach sich Zeitungsverleger-Sohn Steve, auf die Suche, um Hughies Existenz zu widerlegen...

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Während eines Anhalter-Trips landet die junge Vanessa im Krankenhaus von Coopers Crossing. Weil sie große Angst hat, dort von ihrem Ex-Freund Bruce gefunden zu werden, nimmt Geoffrey sie bei sich auf. Doch Bruce erfährt, wo Vanessa ist…

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Ein Ehepaar wird vor seinem Wohnwagen tot aufgefunden. Die Polizei verdächtigt drei Jahrmarkt-Schausteller. Nancy ist entsetzt, als sie erfährt, dass ausgerechnet der junge Schausteller, dem sie Zuflucht gewährt hatte, der Mörder ist.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Farmer Farley steht am Rande des Ruins. Doch er möchte unbedingt den Herzenswunsch seiner kranken Tochter erfüllen, eine Reise nach Venedig. In seiner Verzweiflung stiehlt er George Baxter einige Kälber - und wird dafür grausam erpresst...

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Griechische Freunde von D. J. eröffnen eine Taverne in Coopers Crossing. Doch die Gäste bleiben aus, und bei der Eröffnung erleidet ein Gast eine Salmonellenvergiftung. Schuld daran sind wohl die Eier der alten Nellie Keene …

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Zur 100Jahr-Feier von Coopers Crossing stellt eine Aufführung einen dramatischen Kamelritt nach, aus der Zeit bevor es die "Flying Doctors" gab. Am gleichen Tag muss Chris nur mit einem Esel ein schwerkrankes Kind ins Krankenhaus retten.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Emma und Sam kommen von ihrer Hochzeitsreise zurück und können nun im "Flying Doctors" Haus wohnen. Doch was wird mit Kate? Ein Ex Box-Champion, der vom Come Back träumt, wird bei einem Schaukampf so schwer verletzt, dass er aufgeben muss.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Der 52-jährige Roger Manning ist seit kurzem mit der jungen Sandra verheiratet, die zuvor wegen Mordes an ihrem ersten Mannn verdächtigt wurde. Mannings Schwester ist extrem eifersüchtig. Und plötzlich ist tatächlich Gift im Spiel...

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Ron Thorpe wird nach einem Autounfall bewusstlos ins Krankenhaus eingeliefert. Ann Larson, die ihn zuvor mit seiner kleinen Tochter gesehen hat, bittet ihren Mann Jack das Mädchen im Busch zu suchen, doch Jack nimmt sie nicht ernst…

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Bei den "Flying Doctors" geht es drunter und drüber. Ständige Notrufe verhindern die Sprechstunde. Ein abgehackter Daumen, muss gesucht werden. Ausgerechnet in dieser Situation erscheint die RFDS Vizepräsidentin für eine Kontrolle…

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Der Walter, seit Jahrzehnten Alkoholiker, trifft auf D. J.s Freund Marty. Der junge Mann ist auf dem Sprung, sich ganz aufzugeben, und nur noch dem Alkohol und den Mädchen zu widmen. Walter versucht verzweifelt, ihn zur Umkehr zu bewegen.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Meg Greenways Vater verbietet ihr die Teilnahme an einem Kamelrennen. Als Baxter sich zur gleichen Zeit mit einer frauenfeindlichen Äußerung einen politischen Schnitzer leistet, wissen Sam und Emma, die Situation für Meg zu nutzen.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Der angeschlagene Maler Prescott möchte durch einen vorgetäuschten Selbstmord den Wert seiner Bilder steigern. Doch dann gerät er tatsächlich in Gefahr. Wie reagiert sein Partner? Und wie reagiert Chris, als Jack ihr seine Liebe gesteht?

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Kimberly White kommt für ein amerikanisches Unternehmen aus New York in die Stadt. Zuhause versucht ihr Kollege, sie in der Firma auszustechen. Sie sucht Rat bei Chris. In der Stadt gibt es zwei Windpockenfälle: Soula und D.J. Ein Zufall…?

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Mike Lancaster ist bei einer Sprengung verletzt worden. Beim seinem Rettungsversuch verletzt Geoffrey sich selbst und muss in Broken Hill versorgt werden. Da stellt Chris bei Mike einen Milzriß fest und muss nun ganz allein operieren.

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Während einer Gruppenreise erzählt Connie Porter ihren Mitreisenden so lange von "ihrem Robert", dass manche den Verdacht haben, er würde gar nicht existieren. Als Connie im Krankenhaus landet, möchte Geoffrey ihren Mann benachrichtigen...

programme.title: Die fliegenden Ärzte
programme.desc: Als Cameron erfährt, dass sich seine Eltern scheiden lassen wollen, versucht er, durch eine vorgetäuschte Krankheit seine Eltern zum Zusammenbleiben zu bewegen. Beim Tod seines Bruders vor vier Jahren, hatte diese Methode funktioniert…

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: Si quieres ver vehículos de lujo o tuneados nunca vistos, tienes que ir a "The Walk", el glamuroso bulevar de Jumeirah Beach. Put Your Car on TV invita a los propietarios a que sus vehículos sean valorados por Saif Hattawi.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: 1954. Mercedes corre de nuevo. Después de más de 20 años de abstinencia, Mercedes regresa al circuito del Gran Prix. Con mucho compromiso, ingeniería avanzada y con los mejores pilotos de Gran Prix del mundo...

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Los coches deportivos ingleses son los clásicos entre los coupés, coches tan geniales como James Bond. Aston Martin, Bentley y Jaguar producen los cupés más exclusivos y elegantes del mundo.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: El Porsche 911 Targa es un clásico y un buen ejemplo de descapotable emblemático. Y además: el ligero Lotus Seven Twin Cam SS es más para una carrera que un vehículo de carretera normal; el Bentley de 1930 de 4,5 litros Bentley es el Santo Grial…

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Siempre mezquino, siempre radical y de alguna manera aparentemente no de este mundo - Lamborghini. Ningún modelo se produce en serie, muchos modelos son únicos. Frank Sinatra dijo una vez, si quieres ser alguien, compras un Ferrari.

programme.title: Classic Races: Quattro "La nueva dimensión 1985"
programme.desc: En 1985 Audi necesitaba dejar su marca en el deporte del motor e hizo exactamente eso con el "Quattro". En la escena de los rallyes, los chicos de Ingolstadt (Alemania) se hicieron con algo que es realmente de una nueva dimensión.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Alois Ruf es el fundador de una pequeña pero conocida fábrica de coches de Baviera especializada en construir su propia versión de coches deportivos, pero basándose en la carrocería de los Porsche.…

programme.title: Dream Cars: Todoterrenos alemanes
programme.desc: BMW X5M, Audi Q7, Mercedes GLS y Porsche Cayenne turbo - los deportivos utilitarios "made in Germany" son la encarnación de la perfección técnica, del rendimiento y del confort.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Hay un coche que todo el mundo conoce. Un coche al que se le ha dado un apodo y no se le ha vuelto a llamar de otra manera: El Escarabajo VW. Con más de 60 años de antigüedad, nos dice más sobre nuestro siglo que muchos libros de historia.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Durante los años 50 y 70, Hans Herrmann se hizo famoso gracias a su éxito como piloto de Fórmula 1 y de coches deportivos de fabricantes como Porsche, Mercedes-Benz y Maserati, además de ganar varias veces las 24 Horas de Le Mans.…

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: Los presentadores invitan a los magnates de Oriente Medio a llevar sus coches tuneados al 'The Walk' en la playa de Jumeirah y a clasificarlos por su velocidad, estilo y sonido. Quien reciba más puntos ganará una estancia de una noche para dos...

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: La gente de Oriente Medio está loca por sus coches. En Put Your Car on TV pueden presentar sus vehículos tuneados y valorados. Se les otorgan puntos por la velocidad, el estilo y el sonido y el propietario con más puntos gana un regalo especial…

programme.title: Superautos: Coches joya
programme.desc: El Mulsanne, coche insignia de Bentley, es tan lujoso como un hotel de primera clase y tan elegante como un traje de Armani.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Estos son coches con pasión. Desde el principio, Citroën celebra la alegría de la extravagancia. Un hito en la historia del automóvil es el Traction Avant, llamado el sedán gángster.

programme.title: Superautos
programme.desc: El diseño y la sofisticada tecnología del Audi R8 V10 Spyder fue concebido como ejemplo de lo que un fabricante de automóviles es capaz de hacer. Fue desarrollado con el fin de convertirse en un coche icónico.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: El placer de conducir: BMW, uno de los grupos automovilísticos más exitosos del mundo, promete eso. Los automóviles y motocicletas deportivas de Bavarian Motorenwerke AG son igualmente populares entre los clientes.

programme.title: Superautos
programme.desc: Este episodio se centra en la sexta generación de dos clásicos estadounidenses, el Ford Mustang GT y el Chevrolet Corvette Z06, en la historia y el desarrollo de estos icónicos coches deportivos de las últimas décadas.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Land's End en Cornwall y John O'Groats en Escocia forman el punto de partida y de llegada del Rallye Le Jog, considerado por muchos el rally de coches clásicos más duro del mundo. Acompañamos a un equipo femenino alemán en este desafío.

programme.title: Superautos
programme.desc: El Porsche Cayman GT4 combinaba los mejores componentes que Porsche podía ofrecer: el motor V6 Boxer del 911 Carrera S, el chasis, el sistema de frenos y la aerodinámica del GT3, y una transmisión de seis velocidades.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Ya sea el Porsche 911 Cabriolet, el Audi R8 Spyder o el Mercedes SLS AMG Roadster, los descapotables alemanes gozan de una reputación mundial. Son famosos por su perfección y fiabilidad. Son considerados como la encarnación del estatus...

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: El Trofeo Histórico en el circuito de Nürburgring incluía coches clásicos de los deportes de motor. Y además: con el M3, BMW llevó la tecnología de los coches de carreras a las calles al ser un coche versátil, adecuado para la ciudad.

programme.title: Superautos
programme.desc: Sant'Agata Bolognese, la casa del famoso fabricante italiano de coches deportivos Lamborghini, es el lugar perfecto para observar más de cerca los diferentes modelos Gallardo de la marca.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: El nombre de la familia Porsche lleva ligado al diseño, la fabricación y las carreras de coches desde principios del siglo XX. Tras la Segunda Guerra Mundial, y siguiendo los pasos de su padre que había sido responsable de desarrollo del clásico…

programme.title: Classic Races: Pikes Peak
programme.desc: La subida a la colina de Pikes Peak de 1987. Un tipo de carrera bastante diferente en las montañas de Colorado, EE.UU.. Es única, fascinante y llena de aventura.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV

programme.title: Aero, Por Trás da Aviação
programme.sub-title: Antigos aviões da Vasp e Desorientação espacial
programme.desc: O Aero vai à cidade de Araraquara para conhecer o Cmte. Capistrani, ex-piloto que restaurou dois aviões Boeing 737-200 da VASP. O episódio também mostra os efeitos da desorientação espacial.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: O carro de Krissy sofre uma grande transformação ao ter todo seu teto substituído por um de fibra de vidro. As portas foram substituídas e o motor foi reconstruído completamente e cromado.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Esse Honra CRX 1987 teve seu corpo reaproveitado e ganhou uma pintura especial acentuada com gráficos em recorte em vinil personalizados nas cores preto e prata.

programme.title: Lowrider Brasil
programme.desc: Tatá e Alemão vão à cadeia visitar Blenzer, um rapper da cultura lowrider. Ao fim da visita, Alemão é surpreendido com um presente de Tatá: bombas para seu triciclo.

programme.title: Lowrider Brasil
programme.desc: Tatá orienta Joddy, um aspirante a membro do car club, no upgrade da tapeçaria de seu Impala. Mas quando o Vida Real é convidado para participar de um clipe com o rapper Afro-X dali a poucos dias, o projeto precisa ser acelerado de última hora.

programme.title: Estradas Mortais: A Despedida de um Caminhoneiro
programme.desc: Alex recebe um diagnóstico que pode significar o fim de sua temporada. Rick ameaça pedir demissão se seu chefe não o deixar tirar uma folga para ver um médico. Os veteranos assumem o desafio de transportar as cargas finais do movimento da plataforma.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Motores de cabeza plana hasta la muerte
programme.sub-title: Motores de cabeza plana hasta la muerte
programme.desc: Cris quiere la F1 de 1950 que condujo en la secundaria, pero también quiere instalarle un V8 de cabeza plana. A Dan le encanta la idea, pero hacer que funcione resulta un reto mayor.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Caos con el auto kit
programme.desc: Bob pasó unas 6000 horas tratando de restaurar su amada camioneta K20 de 1969, pero necesita que Fantom Works resuelva algunos problemas en ella.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Nudillo roto
programme.desc: Kim y Doug quieren conducir el súper raro Tornado Thunderbolt de 1959 de su papá, lamentablemente, el auto fue diseñado para competir, no para la calle.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Mejor dicho
programme.desc: Larry quiere que Dan restaure el preciado Cadillac DeVille rosa de 1959 que recuerda de su infancia. Desafortunadamente, el automóvil es un sedán que se ha estado horneando bajo el sol de Arizona durante décadas.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Décadas para conducir
programme.desc: Dave negoció por el Corvette de 1957 de sus sueños hace más de tres décadas, pero el auto llegó en pedazos. Desde bellotas en el motor, hasta miles de piezas que no coinciden.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Todo por ole Miss
programme.desc: Sean le pide a Dan que transforme un Camaro de 1969 en el restomod personalizado de sus sueños. Pero primero, Dan tiene que encontrarle el auto.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Legado
programme.desc: Tom le pide a Dan que le busque un Camaro Convertible de 1967 poco común con aire acondicionado de fábrica para su novia. Pero cuando Dan encuentra el Unicornio, el auto es demasiado bueno para cortarlo.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Un potente escarabajo
programme.desc: David es un fanático del Volkswagen y quiere un Escarabajo de 1967 más ancho, más bajo y más rápido que pueda superar a los muscle cars.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Un Mustang de locos
programme.desc: Arthur compró su Cyclone nuevo en 1967. Luego, su padre hizo 643.737,6 kilómetros en él. Ahora, quiere que FantomWorks lo haga mejor que nuevo.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Un Chevy enojado
programme.desc: FantomWorks completa la construcción del Mustang Sleeper definitivo para Antonio y Andrés: un California Special que parece original, pero funciona con un Coyote Aluminator.

programme.title: FantomWorks: A contracorriente
programme.desc: Chris le pide a FantomWorks que inyecte nueva vida a un Mercury Woody de 1951 que inició un legado familiar. Desafortunadamente, el auto estuvo en un gallinero por treinta años.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kolin le pide a Dan que repare su Corvette de 1973 destrozado, pero Dan encuentra problemas importantes que existían antes del accidente.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Chevrolet hasta el final
programme.desc: Jay le trae a Dan un Camaro ZL1 2012 con bajo rendimiento y un súper cargador quemado.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Flatheads por siempre
programme.desc: Arnold le trae a Dan dos proyectos entrelazados con altas expectativas y desafíos ocultos.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Bloque por Bricklin
programme.desc: Walter trae su Bricklin de 1975 a FantomWorks con la esperanza que Dan pueda solucionar los problemas que surgieron cuando se construyó. Y luego agregar misiles.

programme.title: FantomWorks: Caos metro (Parte 1)

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Montreal - Parte 1
programme.desc: El World Poker Tour regresa al Playground Poker Club en Montreal, Quebec, Canadá, y 732 jugadores compiten por su parte del pozo de premios de más de $ 2 millones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Montreal - Parte 2
programme.desc: Quedan cinco jugadores en la mesa final del WPT Montreal en Playground Poker Club. El ganador se llevará a casa más de $ 400,000, junto con un par de auriculares Monster® 24K® y un reloj Hublot® King Power Unico.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Montreal - Parte 3
programme.desc: Solo Jonathan Jaffe y Ratharam Sivagnanam se encuentran entre el Jugador del Año del WPT de la XIII Temporada Mukul Pahuja y su primer título del WPT. El ganador del WPT Montreal gana más de $ 400,000 y un asiento en el Campeonato Mundial WPT.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 1
programme.sub-title: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 1
programme.desc: El World Poker Tour regresa al legendario Bellagio en Las Vegas, Nevada, donde 586 entradas compiten por su parte del pozo de premios de más de $ 5.6 millones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 2
programme.sub-title: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 2
programme.desc: Quedan cinco jugadores en la mesa final del WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic. El ganador se llevará a casa casi $ 1,500,000. WPT Ones to Watch Garrett Greer tiene un enorme liderazgo en fichas y el campeón del WPT de la temporada XII, Mohsin Charania.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 3
programme.sub-title: Bellagio 5 Diamond World Poker Classic – Parte 3
programme.desc: Garrett Greer tiene un enorme liderazgo en fichas sobre sus compañeros profesionales Brett Shaffer y el campeón de la temporada XII WPT, Mohsin Charania. El ganador del WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic ganará casi $ 1,500,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Classic - Parte 1
programme.desc: Más de $ 3 millones están en juego en el WPT Borgata Poker Open. El líder en fichas y campeón del WPT, Shawn Cunix, está en busca de su segundo título, mientras que Esther Taylor-Brady está tratando de hacer historia como la primera mujer gana.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Classic - Parte 2
programme.desc: El campeón del World Poker Tour, Shawn Cunix, sigue siendo el líder en fichas en la mesa final del WPT Borgata Poker Open, ya que los cinco jugadores finales compiten por un premio de más de $ 700,000 por el primer lugar.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Borgata Poker Classic - Parte 3
programme.desc: El local Eugene Todd tiene el liderazgo en fichas en la mesa final del WPT Borgata Poker Open, pero tendrá que defenderse del campeón del World Poker Tour Shawn Cunix y del profesional Aaron Mermelstein para ganar el primer premio de más de $ 700.000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Fallsview Poker Classic - Parte 1
programme.desc: El World Poker Tour regresa a Canadá para el WPT Fallsview Poker Classic con una entrada de $ 5,000. El evento atrajo a un campo de 419 participantes creando un premio acumulado de más de $ 1,5 millones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Fallsview Poker Classic - Parte 2
programme.desc: El World Poker Tour regresa a Canadá para el WPT Fallsview Poker Classic con una entrada de $ 5,000. El evento atrajo a un campo de 419 participantes creando un premio acumulado de más de $ 1,5 millones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Fallsview Poker Classic - Parte 3
programme.desc: Solo quedan tres jugadores en la temporada XIII del WPT Fallsview Poker Classic. Por primera vez, el campeón de la temporada XII del WPT, Anthony Zinno, está en la lista de jugadores cortos. Zinno, Corey Hochman y Mark Bailey luchan por el primer premio.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic - Parte 1
programme.desc: Recién salido de su victoria en el WPT Fallsview Poker Classic, Anthony Zinno busca victorias consecutivas y su tercer título del World Poker Tour en el WPT L.A. Poker Classic.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic - Parte 2
programme.desc: Con más de $ 1 millón en juego, Anthony Zinno permanece en la búsqueda de victorias consecutivas y su tercer título del World Poker Tour en el WPT L.A. Poker Classic. En su camino se encuentran los experimentados profesionales Mike Leah y Chris Klodnicki.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic - Parte 3
programme.desc: Más de $ 1 millón está en juego en la mesa final del WPT L.A. Poker Classic. Anthony Zinno se acerca más a convertirse en el primer jugador en ganar títulos consecutivos del WPT en la misma temporada.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bay 101 Shooting Star – Parte 1
programme.desc: Con 708 entradas, hay 4,8 millones de dólares en juego en el WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star. Isaac Baron lidera una mesa final apilada, que incluye a Taylor Paur, Jake Bazeley y las estrellas fugaces Faraz Jaka y Sorel Mizzi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bay 101 Shooting Star – Parte 2
programme.desc: Los mejores profesionales Isaac Baron, Jake Bazeley, Taylor Paur, Sorel Mizzi y el jugador del año del WPT de la temporada VIII, Faraz Jaka, compiten por el primer premio de más de 1,2 millones de dólares en el WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bay 101 Shooting Star – Parte 3
programme.desc: Sorel Mizzi es la única estrella fugaz que queda en Bay 101 y compite contra los mejores profesionales Isaac Baron, Jake Bazeley y Taylor Paur por el primer premio de más de 1,2 millones de dólares.

programme.title: Case Pazzesche

programme.title: Case Pazzesche

programme.title: Case Pazzesche

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room with a View
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All that Glitters is Gold
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: The victim was well-liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In For Murder
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In For Murder
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: The gunman opened fire as the family of four entered their home. He’d pulled open a few drawers to make it look like a robbery, but the scene was clearly staged. When police pieced together the clues, they discovered an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: The gunman opened fire as the family of four entered their home. He’d pulled open a few drawers to make it look like a robbery, but the scene was clearly staged. When police pieced together the clues, they discovered an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up On Crime
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High 'n Dry
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-be Killer
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.desc: Carly y Sam se enfrentan a los escritores de un programa de televisión que han estado copiando material de iCarly, y Spencer y Freddie intentan encontrar la cabeza congelada del fundador de Dingo Studios.

programme.title: iCarly: Descubre que se besaron
programme.desc: Carly se enfrenta a sus amigos preguntándoles por qué nunca le contaron que se habían besado. Spencer va a prisión para enseñarle dibujo a los presos.

programme.title: iCarly: Concurso de cocina
programme.desc: Cuando Carly, Sam y Freddie rechazan salir en programa de televisión para hacer un reto de cocina con un chef, el chef deja la cocina, deja su programa, y se niega a salir de su habitación.

programme.title: iCarly: Tenemos nuevos directores
programme.desc: Cuando Carly, Sam y Freddie accidentalmente provocan al despido del director del colegio, la señorita Briggs y el Señor Howart toman el control del colegio y los obligan a cumplir las reglas y el código de vestimenta.

programme.title: iCarly: Cita rápida
programme.desc: Cuando Sam hace un anuncio de 'Lleva a Carly al concurso de baile' para un concurso de baile con chicas, aparecen muchos chicos que Carly, Sam y Freddie tienen que organizar una sesión de citas rápidas para conocerlos a todos.

programme.title: iCarly: La estatua de Giberty
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie están de acuerdo en hacer un videoclip para una estarella del pop que está intentando volver a la música. Spencer se encuentra un problema cuando tiene una cita con una mujer y descubre que es la madre de Gibby.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddy enfurece a Gibby
programme.desc: Cuando Gibby descubre a Freddie y a su novia juntos, promete venganza y reta a Freddie a una lucha. La carrera artística de Spencer crece de repente cuando el periódico local de repente anuncia su muerte.

programme.title: iCarly: Encuentran el amor perdido de Lewbert
programme.sub-title: Encuentran el amor perdido de Lewbert

programme.desc: Sam revela a Carly y Freddie que ella solía competir en pasarelas cuando era pequeña. Cuando se da cuenta de que su eterna rival estará compitiendo en Seattle, convence a Carly para competir contra ella.

programme.title: iCarly: No se cancela
programme.desc: Cuando Sam termina en la cárcel, Carly y Freddie prometen que el show online seguirá adelante. Tratan de pedirle ayuda a Spencer pero en el último minuto tiene una cita que no puede rechazar.

programme.title: iCarly: Va al espacio
programme.desc: Un billonario excéntrico le pregunta al equipo de iCarly si quieren actuar en el primer show en directo desde el espacio exterior. El equipo tendrá que superar una serie de test para comprobar que están preparados para viajar al espacio.

programme.title: iCarly: Carly cree en Pie Grande
programme.desc: Cuando unos excursionistas graban un sospechoso material en el bosque, la gente cree que es Bigfoot. Carly convence a la pandilla para unirse a la búsqueda de Bigfoot.

programme.desc: Harto de que su madre lo trate como un bebé, Freddie se independiza. La banda empieza un exitoso negocio de fotografía de mascotas y aparece un estudio fotográfico rival que les hace la competencia.

programme.title: iCarly: Calor sofocante
programme.desc: Cuando una ola de calor llega a Seattle y se va la luz, Spencer va al rescate con un aparato noruego de aire acondicionado.

programme.desc: Nora, una chica de 16 aó1os, invita a Carly, Freddie y Sam a su cumpleaó1os. Cuando la fiesta está terminando, Carly, Sam y Freddie se encuentran en una situació3n complicada. Mientras tanto, Gibby y Cuppy acampan con Spencer.

programme.title: iCarly: La chiflada Parte 2

programme.title: iCarly: Tomas falsas
programme.desc: Se ven tomas falsas exclusivas, nunca antes vistas, de toda la serie.

programme.title: iCarly: Mi cuarto está en llamas
programme.desc: Spencer intenta sorprender a Carly por su cumpleaños y termina quemando su habitación. Pero cuando la compañía de seguros le da un cheque a cambio, él tiene una oportunidad para arreglarlo con ella.

programme.title: iCarly: Sí, quiero
programme.desc: Después de que un fan de iCarly le pida matrimonio a su novia en directo, la banda tiene que ir a la boda. Pero cuando a la novia le entran las dudas, Carly debe ir al rescate.

programme.title: iCarly: Vende Camisetas
programme.desc: La banda comienza un negocio de vender camisetas. Las ventas superan sus expectativas y Sam recluta a algunos estudiantes para que ayuden a hacer camisetas. Pero Carly, Sam y Freddie no están de acuerdo con su manera de tratarlos.

programme.title: iCarly: Gasta una broma
programme.desc: Carly nunca ha gastado una broma y le pide ayuda a Spencer para gastarle una broma a Sam y a Freddie, pero Spencer, después de probarlo, ahora no puede dejar de gastar bromas. La pandilla debe arreglárselas para pararlo.

programme.title: iCarly: La madre de Sam
programme.desc: Después de tener una discusión con su madre, Sam se muda con Carly, quien pronto se da cuenta de que es un huésped horrible. Freddie es perseguido por un criminal después de haberlo grabado en vídeo cometiendo un crimen.

programme.title: iCarly: Pobre Nevel
programme.desc: Cuando un vídeo de Nevel gritándole a una niña pequeña recorre la red, todo el mundo empieza a odiar a Nevel. Después de celebrar que Nevel se va, el equipo de iCarly trabaja para recuperar su reputación después de que él se lo suplique.

programme.title: iCarly: Contrata a un idiota
programme.desc: Un chico muy mono es contratado por Carly y Sam como becario para el show online.

programme.title: iCarly: Guerra de fans
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie empiezan una guerra fanática accidentalmente, que deberían terminar en parejas: Carly y Freddie (Creddie) o Sam y Freddie (Seddie). Mientras tanto, Spencer se enfrenta a su archienemigo online.

programme.title: iCarly: ¡Oh, Dios mio!
programme.desc: La pandilla se pasa la noche terminando sus proyectos en el colegio. Carly y Freddie sospechan que Sam está enamorada de su nuevo amigo Brad.

programme.title: iCarly: Hay lío con Victorious
programme.desc: Carly sospecha que su nuevo novio, Steven, le está siendo infiel con Tori Vega, así que la pandilla planea viajar a Los Ángeles para pillarlo en una fiesta.

programme.title: iCarly: Hay lío con Victorious
programme.desc: Carly sospecha que su nuevo novio, Steven, le está siendo infiel con Tori Vega, así que la pandilla planea viajar a Los Ángeles para pillarlo en una fiesta.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Compulsion
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker: the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid, the box exploded, killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shreds of Evidence
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out Of The Grave

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Secret Life
programme.desc: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, homicide detective Joe Kenda follows the trail through a twisting maze of military and cultural secrets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: A frantic 9-1-1 call from a daycare reports an infant found not breathing. After a medical examination reveals signs of child abuse, Kenda must discover who committed the heinous crime.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind the disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: It’s New Year’s Eve weekend, and in the midst of the revelry Miguel Mendez is beaten to death outside a convenience store. Lt. Joe Kenda faces a challenging investigation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow.

programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fate Worst Than Death
programme.desc: At the bottom of a steep ravine, joggers discover a body mutilated beyond recognition. To catch a ruthless maniac, Lt. Joe Kenda must first solve the puzzle of the victim’s identity.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
